Extension
Name
ProbeRelativeDirectories
Returns a list of subdirectories that will be probed when trying to load a specific file.
WorkingDirectory
Returns the base working directory path.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
GetFiles
Returns all file names, mapped to the directory in which they are first found.
TryLoadAsync
Search the file within WorkingDirectory and all ProbeRelativeDirectories sub directories and load as T if found.
